title: ContractMessage
description: All top-level native messages represented as one versioned JSON Schema.

ArtifactCollisionPolicy.description: Atomic behavior when an explicit artifact filename already exists.

BridgeError.description: Public, redaction-safe error returned by the bridge.

message.description: Human-readable message safe to show to a client.

provider.description: Optional provider name, never a credential or account identifier.

retryable.description: Whether retrying later may succeed without changing the request.

upstream_request_id.description: Safe provider correlation ID when one exists.

CompatibilityMode.description: Compatibility policy used during provider negotiation.

oneOf.description: The selected provider cannot honor the request.
Provider authentication is absent, expired, or rejected.
The caller is authenticated but not entitled to the operation.
A safety system rejected the request.
A provider or bridge rate limit was reached.
Admission control rejected the request because capacity is exhausted.
The caller or runtime cancelled the operation.
An upstream provider returned an invalid or unsuccessful response.
The upstream protocol no longer matches the supported schema.
An input could not be loaded or validated.
A generated artifact could not be verified or published.
A requested session does not exist or cannot be accessed.
An idempotency key conflicts with a different request.

GeneratedImage.description: Metadata and payload for one generated image.

generation_ms.description: Provider time for this output when measured independently.

action.description: Generate/edit selection for transports with an image tool action.

failure_policy.description: Behavior when one output in a multi-image request fails.

input_fidelity.description: Optional input-image fidelity for edit/reference operations.

output_compression.description: Compression from 0 to 100 for JPEG or WebP.

partial_images.description: Requested number of partial progress images.

ImageAction.description: Image-generation tool action for conversational transports.

ImageFailure.description: Failure for one output in a best-effort multi-image request.

generation_ms.description: Provider time spent before the failure.

ImageInput.description: One image input plus optional metadata.

oneOf.description: Path resolved under configured allowed roots.
Remote HTTP(S) URL, only when remote loading is enabled.

data.description: Encoded body without a data URL prefix.

negative_prompt.description: Optional negative prompt interpreted according to bridge policy.

prompt.description: Positive prompt passed to image generation.

session.description: Session behavior for providers that support conversations.

user.description: Optional opaque end-user identifier forwarded only by configured providers.

oneOf.description: Generate an image, optionally using reference images.
Edit one or more source images with an optional mask and references.

failures.description: Per-output failures returned only by best-effort multi-image requests.

revised_prompt.description: Revised prompt when available and permitted by policy.

max_bytes_total.description: Maximum decoded bytes across all inputs.

support.description: Support level for the input class.

InputFidelity.description: Fidelity used when processing image inputs.

MultiImageFailurePolicy.description: Behavior when one output in a multi-image request fails.

NegativePromptMode.description: Handling policy for a negative prompt.

Normalization.description: One explicit normalization or fallback applied to a request.

collision.description: Atomic behavior if an explicit filename already exists.

directory.description: Optional portable relative directory below the configured artifact root.

filename.description: Optional exact single-image filename, with or without a matching extension.

ProviderCapabilities.description: Complete capability declaration for one provider/model pair.

experimental.description: Whether this adapter targets an unstable/private upstream interface.

explicit_threads.description: Whether explicit upstream thread IDs are supported.

model.description: Model for which these capabilities apply.

persistent_sessions.description: Whether provider-backed persistent sessions are supported.

ProviderDescriptor.description: Provider identity shown in discovery endpoints.

oneOf.description: Optional textual progress that contains no prompt or credential data.

response.description: Normalized provider response before artifact publication.

RevisedPromptPolicy.description: Visibility and requirement policy for an upstream revised prompt.

model.description: Explicit provider model, or the provider default when absent.

provider.description: Explicit provider name, or the configured default when absent.

SessionMetadata.description: Session information returned after a request.

key.description: Caller-visible session key when persistent mode was used.

reused.description: Whether an existing thread was reused.

thread_id.description: Upstream thread ID when policy allows returning it.

SessionMode.description: Codex conversation behavior for a request.

key.description: Caller-selected durable binding key for persistent mode.

thread_id.description: Existing provider thread ID for explicit-thread mode.

SizeCapabilities.description: Explicit-size constraints for a provider or model.

allowed.description: Fixed accepted sizes. Empty when generic constraints apply.

arbitrary.description: Whether arbitrary explicit dimensions are accepted.

edge_multiple.description: Required edge multiple for arbitrary dimensions.

max_pixels.description: Maximum total pixels for arbitrary dimensions.

min_pixels.description: Minimum total pixels for arbitrary dimensions.

SupportLevel.description: Degree to which a provider supports a semantic feature.

oneOf.description: The provider handles the feature natively.
The bridge can emulate the feature with a reported transformation.

input_ms.description: Time spent loading and validating inputs.

U8Range.description: Inclusive range for a small integer parameter.

input_tokens.description: Input tokens reported by the provider.

output_tokens.description: Output tokens reported by the provider.

total_tokens.description: Total tokens reported by the provider.
